plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to zero, removing high risk.
Increase allocation to QQQI for income generation.
Trim broad index exposure in QQQ and SPY to reduce concentration.
Buy XOM and COP, strong energy names with good scanner reads.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a larger cash buffer.
Expect a lower target return and significantly reduced drawdown potential.
conservative.read: This plan aims for ~1.5% monthly return by prioritizing stability. It significantly cuts leverage and concentration risk. Expect lower upside but much tighter drawdowns.

plan: Trim SOXL to a minimal 2% and sell SPAL entirely.
Increase QQQI for income, balancing tech exposure.
Trim SPY and QQQ to reduce concentration and free up capital.
Buy AMD and META, strong tech names with good scanner scores.
This plan balances risk reduction with growth opportunities.
Expect a moderate return target with controlled risk.
balanced.read: This plan targets ~2.5% monthly return by balancing risk reduction and growth. It trims leverage and concentration while adding diversified names. Drawdowns are expected to be moderate.

plan: Increase SOXL to 10% and add SPAL at 5% to leverage sector bets.
Trim QQQI to 5% to reallocate capital to growth.
Trim SPY and QQQ to manage concentration while retaining index exposure.
Significantly increase AMD and META to 15% each, pressing conviction.
This plan aggressively pursues growth by increasing leverage and concentration.
Expect higher potential returns but also significantly larger drawdowns and leverage decay.
aggressive.read: This plan targets ~4% monthly return by embracing leverage and concentration. It increases leveraged ETFs and high-conviction tech names. Expect amplified gains and losses, with significant drawdown risk and daily leverage decay.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and high-beta CRWD to zero.
Maximize QQQI allocation to 30% for steady income distributions.
Increase SPY to 40% for broad market stability and income potential.
Buy XOM and COP for stable income and dividend payouts.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and reliable monthly income.
Expect low drawdowns and consistent, though variable, income distributions.
income.read: This plan targets ~1% monthly return by prioritizing stable income and capital preservation. It cuts all high-risk assets and focuses on income ETFs and stable dividend payers. Expect low drawdowns and reliable, albeit variable, income.
